scenes.script_line: The first workplace is untidy — tools on the ground, rubbish, dirty equipment.
scenes.visual_direction: Messy, neglected site/workshop — unease, distrust. Wide disorder + detail of tools on the floor.

scenes.script_line: The second is clean, everything in its place — people take pride.
scenes.visual_direction: Clean, orderly site/workshop — calm, trust. Wide tidy space + detail of organized tools.

scenes.script_line: The small things become the big things — caring about detail.
scenes.visual_direction: Close, careful handwork — focus, care. Detail/hands heavy.

scenes.script_line: How you park your car tells people something — did you park straight?
scenes.visual_direction: A work vehicle parked neatly and considerately within the lines.

scenes.script_line: How you leave a room — lights off, tidy, chair in.
scenes.visual_direction: Leaving a space in order — sweeping, tidying, switching off, putting away.

scenes.script_line: How you treat your tools — clean, put back, respected.
scenes.visual_direction: Well-kept tools returned to their place — respect. Detail of cleaning/hanging tools.

scenes.script_line: How you finish a job — clean the area, remove rubbish, check once more.
scenes.visual_direction: Cleaning up the work area at the end of a job — diligence.

scenes.script_line: Two painters — one leaves a mess, one leaves it spotless.
scenes.visual_direction: A painter/decorator working with care — clean brushes, tape removed, spotless.

scenes.script_line: A sloppy note vs a clear one — the details matter.
scenes.visual_direction: Careful marking/measuring/noting on site — precise, neat handwork.

scenes.script_line: A small water leak ignored becomes a major repair.
scenes.visual_direction: Spotting a small defect early — vigilance. Detail of a drip/leak, then noticing it.

scenes.script_line: Before you finish, stop a minute: 'What have I missed?'
scenes.visual_direction: A final quality check — conscientiousness. Inspecting the work once more.

scenes.script_line: Your reputation is built one small action at a time.
scenes.visual_direction: Small consistent acts of craftsmanship and pride — precise, focused handwork.

scenes.script_line: Excellence is thousands of small decisions — leave every place better.
scenes.visual_direction: A finished quality build, tidy and complete — pride, excellence.

clips.author: U.S. Army USACOE-ED by Christopher Gardner
